title: Create getting started guide
description: Add a concise 5-minute guide covering install, init, and first pipeline run.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN docs/getting-started.md is read THEN it covers installation, autob init, and autob run with output location; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:30
review_initial_requirements: Verify command names use autob and examples avoid real API keys.
review_regression_requirements: Run markdown link/path sanity checks and build/tests if docs reference generated commands.

title: Create configuration guide
description: Document global and project config files, merge rules, examples, and secret handling.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN docs/configuration.md is read THEN it explains ~/.autob/config.json, .autob.json, merge precedence, project apiKey rejection, and redaction; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:31
review_initial_requirements: Verify examples use placeholder keys and match implemented schema.
review_regression_requirements: Run docs sanity checks and secret-shaped scan.

title: Create pipeline guide
description: Document the five pipeline stages, intermediate JSON files, and debugging workflow.

review_initial_requirements: Verify stage outputs match actual filenames produced by runPipeline.
review_regression_requirements: Run a sample pipeline smoke or inspect runner output constants plus docs sanity checks.

title: Create CLI reference
description: Document all commands, arguments, options, and expected exit-code behavior.

review_initial_requirements: Verify CLI reference matches commander help output.
review_regression_requirements: Run built CLI --help and command help checks plus docs sanity checks.

title: Simplify README and link docs
